compiled_state.title: Add scenario analysis phase to brainstorm SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Insert new Step 2.75: Scenario Analysis between existing Step 2.5 (Gap Analysis) and Step 3 (Fidelity Review) in `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md`.

Changes:
- New section with complexity scaling thresholds:
  - Always runs: specs with ≥5 success criteria OR any external integration signal
  - Reduced (cap 3 scenarios): specs with 3-4 success criteria and no integration signals
  - Skip: specs with ≤2 success criteria
- Agent dispatch: dispatch sonnet sub-agent with scenario-red-team.md prompt, then dispatch sonnet sub-agent with scenario-blue-team.md prompt passing red team output
- Scenario Analysis section appended to epic spec output (between Success Criteria and Dependencies)
- Differentiation note: Brainstorm scenario analysis targets epic-level spec gaps (edge cases, failure modes, missing constraints). Preplanning adversarial review (Phase 2.5) targets cross-story interaction gaps (shared state, conflicting assumptions, dependency gaps). These are complementary but distinct.
- Update Quick Reference table at bottom of SKILL.md
- Remove RED marker from .test-index entry
- test-exempt: SKILL.md is a markdown documentation file consumed by LLM agents — metadata/schema structural tests (dcfe-8be7) are the appropriate test boundary

**TDD Requirement**: RED test from dcfe-8be7 fails on SKILL.md assertions. After this task, ALL `test_skill_md_scenario_analysis` assertions turn GREEN and the RED marker is removed from .test-index.

## File Impact
- `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md` (edit)
- `.test-index` (edit — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `bash -n tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh` passes
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md references Scenario Analysis as a heading
  Verify: grep -qiE '^#{1,3}.*Scenario Analysis' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md documents complexity threshold (both numbers and directives)
  Verify: grep -qE '(≥5|≤2)' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md && grep -qE '(skip|always|reduced|cap)' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md differentiates from preplanning adversarial review
  Verify: grep -qi 'preplanning.*adversarial\|adversarial.*review.*cross-story\|complementary.*distinct' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Prompt files referenced by SKILL.md exist on disk
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-red-team.md && test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/scenario-blue-team.md
- [ ] Scenario Analysis test passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q '\[test_scenario_prompt_exists\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — RED test exists) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
